schema_output.scene_summary: ʿ Utbah returns to his people after meeting the Prophet

characters.name: ʿ Utbah ibn Rabīʿ ah
characters.appearance: tall, athletic build, wearing a white thobe with a deep red woolen cloak draped over both shoulders, a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, and a walking stick in his right hand

schema_output.narrative_text: ʿ Utbah has just met the Prophet and is now returning to his people, deep in thought.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A serene and expansive desert landscape with a few scattered palm trees in the distance, their leaves rustling gently in the breeze. Late afternoon sunlight casts a warm glow across the sandy dunes and rocky outcroppings, with a few wispy clouds drifting lazily across the sky. In the foreground, a lone figure is seen walking away from the viewer, his back to the camera: tall, athletic build, wearing a white thobe with a deep red woolen cloak draped over both shoulders, a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, and a walking stick in his right hand. He walks with a thoughtful expression, his head slightly bowed and his eyes cast downward. Soft warm golden light, contemplative mood. Medium shot from behind the figure, looking out at the expansive desert landscape. Warm beige, golden, and pale blue palette with the deep red cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
